Class LaunchGameDriver

java.lang.Object
javafx.application.Application
com.risk.view.LaunchGameDriver
public class LaunchGameDriver extends javafx.application.Application
Launches the Game and provides the main window and the view for the user, either to load or create a new map.
Author:
Karandeep Singh, Ruthvik Shandilya

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      The Main Method which Launches the Game and drives by providing the options.
      Parameters:
      args - main arguments

    • start

      public void start(javafx.stage.Stage primaryStage)
      The main entry point for all JavaFX applications.The start method is called after the init method has returned,and after the system is ready for the application to begin running. NOTE: This method is called on the JavaFX Application Thread.
      Specified by:
      start in class javafx.application.Application
      Parameters:
      primaryStage - the primary stage for this application, onto which the application scene can be set. The primary stage will be embedded in the browser if the application was launched as an applet.Applications may create other stages, if needed, but they will not be primary stages and will not be embedded in the browser.
      See Also:
      • Application.start(Stage)

    • createMapButton

      public static javafx.scene.control.Button createMapButton()
      Map Create Button
      Returns:
      Button wherein button opens up a create map screen.

    • loadMapButton

      public static javafx.scene.control.Button loadMapButton()
      Load map Button
      Returns:
      Button wherein button opens up a new screen to load or edit a map.

    • startGameButton

      public static javafx.scene.control.Button startGameButton()
      Start Game Button
      Returns:
      Button wherein button loads chosen map and starts the game.

    • startSavedGameButton

      public static javafx.scene.control.Button startSavedGameButton()
      Start saved game Button
      Returns:
      Button wherein button loads chosen map and starts the game.
